summary: Opinion piece on the growing barefoot horse movement and rejecting metal shoes in favor of natural hoof care.
Winter horse-care tip from Dr. Hermen Geertsema on preventing impaction colic by keeping horses hydrated with rotated, salted water buckets.
Carole Herder's personal recap of being a Trailblazer finalist at the Canadian Women Entrepreneurs Gala in Toronto.
Q&A between Carole Herder and ACTHA's Carrie Scrima on Cavallo's hoof boots and the brand's partnership as exclusive hoof boot of ACTHA trail challenges.
Short personal post from Carole Herder about meeting Lisa Nichols of 'The Secret' while in Costa Rica.
Winter hoof-care guidance: using Cavallo hoof boots with studs for traction and turnout, plus hydration and feeding tips for cold weather.
Customer testimonial from Genevieve Cherry praising the Cavallo Western All Purpose saddle pad's fit and performance.
Empty 'Happy Holidays!' post containing only a single image and no body text.
Customer testimonial from Hilda Wilkins on using Cavallo Sport Boots for her mule June on trail rides.
Year-end thank-you note to Cavallo customers celebrating a record year of hoof boot and saddle pad sales.
Recap of Cavallo hosting Valley Vet Supply at The Brown Palace in Denver, celebrating their 2010 partnership.
Success story by barefoot trimmer Marianne Allen on rehabilitating a foundered Kentucky Mountain Saddle mare using barefoot trimming and Cavallo hoof boots.
